name: 消费者
description: 首次在对手合作时选择背叛并获得奖励分数。
en_description: Defect against a cooperating opponent for the first time and earn a reward score.

name: 你的名字是？
description: 首次在双方合作对局中选择合作并获得奖励分数。
en_description: Cooperate in a fully cooperative match for the first time and earn a reward score.

name: 三度背叛
description: 连续三次被背叛失去分数。
en_description: Defect three times in a row and lose score.

name: 混沌演说家
description: 每轮成功提交一次有效发言即可触发奖励。可反复触发。
en_description: Submit a valid round speech to earn reward score. Can trigger repeatedly.

name: 圣人
description: 连续五次合作并获得奖励分数。
en_description: Cooperate five times in a row and earn a reward score.

name: 正义的伙伴
description: 背叛一个在上一轮背叛过别人的玩家，并获得奖励分数。
en_description: Defect a player who betrayed others in the previous round and earn a reward score.

name: 下克上的意志
description: 和一个分数比自己高20分以上的对手交战后取胜，获得21分。可反复触发。
en_description: Win against an opponent with 20+ higher score (DC) and earn 21 points. Can trigger repeatedly.

name: 复读机
description: 连续使用八次相同的决策，失去10分。可反复触发。
en_description: Lose 10 points for making the same decision eight times in a row. Can trigger repeatedly.

name: 头号玩家
description: 连续8次合作，直接获得250分，并跃迁为新的‘高分’段位。
en_description: Cooperate eight times in a row to gain 250 points and jump into a new high-score tier.
